actors.name: Péter Magyar
actors.blurb: Magyar's recent election as Hungary's Prime Minister has positioned him as a central figure in European right-wing politics. His actions to form a new government, investigate past administrations, and assert Hungary's stance on EU policies have generated significant coverage and debate.

actors.name: Manuel Adorni
actors.blurb: Adorni has been a prominent figure due to ongoing investigations into alleged illicit enrichment and conflicts within the Argentine government. His role in the administration and the political fallout from these allegations have kept him in the news cycle.

actors.name: Santiago Abascal
actors.blurb: Abascal remains a key actor in Spanish and European right-wing politics due to Vox's influence in regional governments and its strong stance on immigration, national identity, and opposition to progressive policies. His leadership and policy proposals continue to generate significant media coverage.
